unit.comment: // todo: uncopyable type used in a generator

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("#1809 - GENERATE_COPY and SingleValueGenerator does not compile", "[generators][compilation][approvals]")

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Multiple random generators in one test case output different values", "[generators][internals][approvals]")
